meaning: 利文斯敦[赞比亚西南部城市]
examples: Many of the most famous examples of explorers said to have been "lone travellers"—say, Mungo Park or David Livingstone in Africa—were anything but "alone" on their travels.
Still, there are drawbacks to a Livingstone candidacy.
Mr Blair, no mean Livingstone-hater in the past, was dewy-eyed with admiration.
It is, in fact, David Livingstone, reflecting on his experiences in Africa in the 1850s.
Livingstone did give up on him, going north to embark upon his celebrated adventures.
